product_boundary.this_repository: complete WordPress/Gutenberg port control plane, implementation, compatibility evidence, and distribution integration
product_boundary.sdk_boundary: typed plugins, themes, blocks, editor extensions, and WordPress solutions consuming native WordPress/Gutenberg
product_boundary.dependency_direction: wordpresshx-port may pin SDK releases; wordpress-hx-sdk must not depend on port implementation internals

preserved_identifiers: unrelated wordpresshx/* container and package coordinates
historical receipts, manifests, task descriptions, commands, and URLs
non_claims: The repository rename does not add WordPress or Gutenberg Haxe ownership.
The planned wordpress-hx-sdk repository is not created or implemented by this migration.
Historical wordpress-hx URLs and published schema identifiers remain valid legacy evidence.
The WPHX/wphx program identifier family is not renamed.
